title: euphrasia trifida var. chrysantha
intro: Euphrasia trifida var. chrysantha, also known as the yellow-flowered eyebright, is a variety of the Euphrasia trifida plant, a flowering plant in the gentian family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and protect the eyes and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Euphrasia trifida var. chrysantha include its ability to alleviate eye problems such as conjunctivitis and dry eyes, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Euphrasia trifida var. chrysantha is often used in herbal preparations, including tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically to the affected area or taken internally to promote overall well-being.
